author: Jash Vora
name: Hybrid XSA-SSM
blurb: Unlimited compute track: Hybrid Transformer–SSM model with a mid-layer Mamba insertion, XSA applied to final layers, and VE/bigram enhancements. Trained with Muon optimizer under a 10-minute hard wallclock cap (stopped at step 3723). Mixed int6/int8 quantization with zstd/zlib compression enabled large MLP and attention banks to fit under the 16,000,000-byte limit. Achieved 1.2146 BPB pre-quantization and 1.255216 BPB after full int8/int6 + compression roundtrip.
